source: Hand-authored signatures for content that looks like it leaks system-prompt internals: env-var-substituted credentials, hardcoded password lines, database-schema dumps, internal-only markers. None of these are guaranteed leaks — they are signals worth a human review, hence severity=medium on R012.

entries.description: Environment-variable substitution that looks like a credential leak path inside a prompt
Hardcoded password / credential line inside a prompt
Database-schema dump pasted into a prompt (table names with column lists)
Prompt contains "internal only" / "confidential" / "do not share" markers — indicates sensitive material
Prompt references admin / root credentials by name
